allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const c = fs.readFileSync\('src/App.jsx','utf8'\); console.log\('Lines:', c.split\('\\n'\).length, '| No dark gradient:', !c.includes\('0f0f1a'\), '| No Space Mono:', !c.includes\('Space Mono'\), '| No emoji icons in tabs:', !c.includes\('cat.icon'\)\)")
